notes: The response is technically thorough and surfaces real risks, but it never frames the RBNZ BS11 notification status as a blocking assumption, fails to name the required personas with role/cost context (RBNZ relationship team, CTO/CRO, retail lending ops are absent or unnamed), produces no explicit MVP boundary with named deferrals, and lacks anchored success indicators — reading more like an engineering risk review than a discovery artefact.
